problem id: eb20ea88
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  01110000 -> 00011111
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11001111 -> 11111111
  01000111 -> 01110101
  00001110 -> 11100011
  01011010 -> 10110111
  11111100 -> 11111111
  10111000 -> 10101111
  00101000 -> 10001010
  00110010 -> 00101111

query: 00000011
predicted answer: 00110000
